meta.title: Karobaar CRM | Built for Indian Sales Teams
meta.description: Close more deals, track every party, and send quotations from one real-time workspace.

announcement.text: New: Payroll auto-filing now live for India + US →

hero.kicker: THE CRM THAT RUNS YOUR WHOLE TEAM
hero.headline: Manage customers, attendance, and payroll — without juggling three tools.
hero.subline: Built for growing Indian teams who are tired of stitching tools together.

without.title: The Old Way
painPoints: Parties in an Excel file no one updates

interactiveSolutions.title: Unified Kanban Board
interactiveSolutions.description: WhatsApp messages and calls automatically log into the CRM pipeline. No more manual data entry or lost leads.

interactiveSolutions.title: Single Source of Truth
interactiveSolutions.description: Every party profile updates in real-time. One click reveals every invoice, quotation, and interaction history.

interactiveSolutions.title: Integrated Invoicing
interactiveSolutions.description: Generate GST-compliant invoices directly from the lead card in under 60 seconds. Syncs seamlessly with your accounting.

interactiveSolutions.title: Zero-Entry Payroll
interactiveSolutions.description: The attendance engine flows directly into the payroll calculator. Taxes and deductions are handled automatically.

architecture.headline: The complete sales lifecycle.
architecture.subline: From the first lead to the final quotation. Karobaar handles your entire workflow in one unified platform.

flowSteps.title: Leads & Pipelines
flowSteps.description: Visualize your entire sales funnel. Drag and drop leads through custom stages and never miss a follow-up.

flowSteps.title: Unified Parties
flowSteps.description: Every lead automatically enriches your Party directory. View full transaction history and activity logs in one place.

flowSteps.title: Instant Quotations
flowSteps.description: Pull products directly from your Catalog to generate professional, accurate quotations in seconds.

flowSteps.title: Analytics & Activity
flowSteps.description: Track your win rates, monitor team activity logs, and get a bird's-eye view of your entire business performance.

sections.title: Custom Pipeline Builder
sections.description: Don't force your sales process into rigid boxes. Build custom stages, triggers, and workflows that match exactly how your business operates.

sections.title: GST-Ready Billing Engine
sections.description: Don't just send quotes, get paid. Convert winning quotations into GST-compliant invoices instantly.

sections.title: Access Control & Activity Logs
sections.description: Control exactly who sees what and track every single action taken across your organization.

testimonialsGrid.title: Read what people are saying
testimonialsGrid.description: Real feedback from growing teams using Karobaar to run their operations.

items.text: Karobaar completely transformed how we manage our media production pipelines. The custom workflows are a lifesaver.
items.name: Ankit

items.text: Before this CRM, our leads were scattered across WhatsApp and Excel. Now everything is unified and our win rate is up 30%.
items.name: Aryan Bhosle

items.text: The GST-ready billing engine alone is worth it. It automatically syncs with our deal stages. Fantastic platform for Indian tech businesses.
items.name: VikasRaj

pricing.headline: Simple pricing for coaching centers.
pricing.trialNote: 14-day free trial · no credit card required

questions.question: How long does setup take?
questions.answer: Most teams are live in under 30 minutes. No engineering required.

questions.question: Can I use my existing party and product data?
questions.answer: Yes. Contact us and we will help you migrate.

questions.question: Is my data safe?
questions.answer: All data is encrypted in transit and at rest.

finalCta.headline: Ready to unify your workflow?
finalCta.subline: Join hundreds of Indian businesses running smarter with Karobaar.
